compiled_state.title: Light code reviewer writes dimensions key but record-review.sh expects scores key in reviewer-findings.json
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: The dso:code-reviewer-light agent writes reviewer-findings.json with a 'dimensions' key, but record-review.sh validates against a schema expecting a 'scores' key. This forces the orchestrator to manually rewrite the file with the correct schema, which violates rule 12 (never manually call record-review.sh / fabricate review data). Either the light reviewer should output the correct schema or record-review.sh should accept both key names.

comments.body: Classification: llm-behavioral (dual-signal: agent output mismatch + agents/ file)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Anti-pattern scan: checked all 9 reviewer delta files. Only light reviewer (haiku model) needed the reinforcement — sonnet/opus models used by standard/deep reviewers are less susceptible to positional bias key conflation.
comments.author: Test
